title: Legal Document Merge System Review: LegalMerge vs DocCombine 2026 Comparison
description: Compare LegalMerge and DocCombine legal document merge systems. Analyze document merging, batch merging, merge ordering, and merge format features. Find th
content:
Legal Document Merge System Overview

Legal document merge systems combine multiple documents into one for easier management. In 2026, LegalMerge and DocCombine are two leading professional products. This review compares their merge features.

Document Merging

Merge FeaturesLegalMergeDocCombine
Merge MethodManual merge, automatic mergeManual merge
Merge OrderCustom merge orderFixed merge order
Merge FormatUnified merge formatPreserve original format
Merge PreviewPreview before mergeNo preview function

Batch Merging

DocCombine offers powerful batch merging with batch selection, batch merge, and batch export. LegalMerge has basic batch features. For batch merging, DocCombine is recommended.

Merge Ordering

LegalMerge provides comprehensive merge ordering with custom ordering, rule ordering, and smart ordering. DocCombine has basic ordering features. For merge ordering, LegalMerge is recommended.

Merge Format

LegalMerge provides unified merge format with format unification, page numbering unification, and table of contents unification. DocCombine has basic format preservation. For unified merge format, LegalMerge is recommended.

Merge Editing

LegalMerge supports post-merge editing, content adjustment, and format adjustment. DocCombine has basic merge editing. For merge editing, LegalMerge is recommended.

Price and Selection

LegalMerge annual fee: 80,000 CNY; DocCombine annual fee: 50,000 CNY. For merge format and merge editing, choose LegalMerge. For batch merging, choose DocCombine.
author: Document Merge Expert
